workflow.name: Ongoing Intake Reuse Positive
workflow.goal: Process two independent intake requests on the same ongoing workflow and return to pending when idle.

memory.intake_policy: Each intake request is independent. Finish a request, close its work item, and leave the workflow pending for the next request.

actions.goal_template: Triage the first incoming request for ongoing workflow reuse proof.
actions.acceptance_criteria_template: The first intake request is triaged, has a structured handoff, and the work item is done.

actions.goal_template: Triage the second incoming request after the workflow has returned to pending.
actions.acceptance_criteria_template: The second intake request is triaged on the same workflow after the first wave completed and the workflow returned to pending.
